title: imagebuildah: drop the duplicate containerIDs list
body: `StageExecutor`s keep their own lists of the IDs of containers that they create, so we don't need to merge them into a single list in the `Executor` that we'll then consult during clean up.  As long as we make sure we only ever try to delete a given stage's containers once, we can just use their lists directly, and avoid duplicating the information.
